title: First Visit Intro Video Initial Working Data
public_goal: Explain Drishvara to first-time visitors in approximately 30 seconds without blocking site use.

intended_runtime.show_condition: first visit or after configured cooldown

paid_preview_space.purpose: Allow approved external/partner preview videos to be considered as a future monetised space.
